title: El escándalo
writer: Pedro Antonio de Alarcón, José Luis Sáenz de Heredia
actors: Armando Calvo, Manuel Luna, Mercedes Vecino
plot: In 1860s Madrid, Fabián Conde is a dissolute young man who drives his dishonored identity into a life of seduction and dueling. When he eventually falls in love, changes for good and finds the truth about his family, his two oppos...
